title: Tksv's PvP Client
description: Just another modpack focused on classic PvP.
body:
**Tksv's PvP Client** (or PvP Pack) is a project born out of personal necessity. I wanted a setup for daily PvP sessions that wouldn't tank my FPS like most major "PvP Clients" do.
Built on version 1.21.4, this pack offers great compatibility with current servers and mod stability. Since the project is still a work in progress (WIP), I plan to update it to newer Minecraft versions as soon as the core mods are ported.

## ✨ Client Highlights:
- 🖥️ Custom Menu: Exclusive interface (WIP) created with FancyMenu.
- 🎯 Custom Crosshair: Design your own crosshair by pressing the ' key.
- ⚔️ PvP Mechanics: Integrated classic combat system (Old Combat).
- 📊 In-game HUD: Armor status, potions, and inventory info (Press L-Shift to configure).
- 🌐 Multiplayer & Textures: 4 Pre-configured servers (Hypixel, Mush, ManaCube, and Hylex) + essential textures included.
- 🔍 Utility: Quick zoom on C and Free Look on Alt.
